prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, split composition, on the left Kinh's wife sewing clothes diligently in a tidy room with warm light, on the right Kiem's wife with messy hair standing with hands on hips scolding her husband in a cluttered room, contrasting mood and lighting, medium shot, professional artwork.
subject: Wives

original_text: Một hôm, Kình bảo vợ: 'Ông nội kể dưới biển có nhiều vàng bạc. Mai vợ chồng mình ra tát cạn biển để tìm của quý và bắt cá.'
translated_text: One day, Kinh said to his wife: 'Grandfather told of treasures beneath the sea. Tomorrow, let us drain the ocean to find gold and catch fish.'
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Kinh sitting on a bamboo mat pointing enthusiastically towards the blue open sea visible through the wooden door frame, his wife listening attentively with a gentle smile, simple wooden house interior, soft natural daylight entering room, hopeful and determined atmosphere, medium shot, highly detailed.
subject: Kinh

original_text: Hôm sau, vợ chồng Kình dậy từ sớm tinh mơ, vác gầu ra tát biển. Họ làm việc cặm cụi bất kể nắng mưa.
translated_text: The next day, rising before dawn, the couple carried wooden scoops to the shore. They bailed water tirelessly, through sun and rain.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a peasant couple standing knee-deep in ocean waves using traditional wooden water scoops (gầu sòng) to bail water, sweat glistening on their faces, rising sun on the horizon creating silhouette effects, dramatic golden hour lighting, hardworking and resilient atmosphere, wide angle shot, 8k resolution.
subject: Kinh and Wife

original_text: Thấy vợ chồng Kình ngày nào cũng ra tát biển, lũ cá rất lo sợ. Chúng nghe lời cụ Chép, khiêng năm hũ vàng dưới đáy biển lên biếu để xin họ dừng tay.
translated_text: Seeing their persistence, the fish were terrified. Led by an elder Carp, they carried five jars of gold from the depths to offer the couple, begging them to stop.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a magical underwater scene, a large golden carp and a school of colorful fish pushing five sealed ceramic jars upwards, bubbles rising towards surface, shafts of sunlight piercing through deep blue water, mystical and vibrant atmosphere, close-up underwater shot, masterpiece quality.
subject: Fish and Carp

original_text: Nhận được vàng, vợ chồng Kình trở nên giàu có. Họ xây nhà cao cửa rộng, ruộng vườn xanh tốt, cuộc sống sung túc.
translated_text: Receiving the gold, Kinh and his wife became wealthy. They built a grand house, cultivated lush green fields, and lived a prosperous life.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a large traditional wooden mansion with red tiled roof surrounded by lush green fruit trees and ripe rice paddies, Kinh and his wife wearing fine silk clothes standing in the brick courtyard, bright sunny lighting, prosperous and happy atmosphere, wide landscape shot, highly detailed.
subject: Kinh and Wife

original_text: Kiếm ngạc nhiên thấy bạn giàu lên nhanh chóng liền đến hỏi thăm. Kình kể hết chuyện và tặng vàng cho bạn làm vốn.
translated_text: Amazed by his friend's sudden wealth, Kiem visited to ask the secret. Kinh shared the story and even gave Kiem some gold to start a business.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Kinh handing gleaming gold bars to Kiem with a generous open-handed gesture, sitting at a carved tea table in a luxurious room with vases, Kiem looking at the gold with wide surprised and envious eyes, warm interior lighting, friendly yet tense atmosphere, medium shot, professional artwork.
subject: Kinh

original_text: Vợ Kiếm nghe chuyện thì nổi lòng tham, muốn đi tát biển ngay. Cô ta đòi thuê người làm nhưng Kiếm gàn lại vì sợ phải chia phần vàng.
translated_text: Hearing the story, Kiem's wife grew greedy. She wanted to drain the sea immediately, but Kiem insisted they work alone to keep all the gold.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Kiem's wife holding a gold nugget tightly with a greedy grin and wild eyes, gesturing excitedly to Kiem, inside a messy dark room, dramatic flickering candlelight casting distorted shadows on walls, greedy and chaotic atmosphere, close-up portrait, highly detailed.
subject: Kiem's Wife

original_text: Sáng hôm sau, vì thói quen ngủ nướng nên mặt trời lên cao vợ chồng Kiếm mới ra đến biển.
translated_text: The next morning, due to their laziness, the sun was already high when Kiem and his wife finally dragged themselves to the beach.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Kiem and his wife walking sluggishly across the hot white sand dragging heavy wooden scoops behind them, bright harsh noon sun beating down from overhead, clear blue sky, tired and lazy atmosphere, wide angle shot, 8k resolution.
subject: Kiem and Wife

original_text: Mới tát được vài gầu, cô vợ đã kêu than nóng bức, đau lưng mỏi gối, chốc chốc lại nhìn ra biển thở dài.
translated_text: After only a few scoops, the wife complained of the heat and back pain. She stopped frequently to sigh and stare at the water.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Kiem's wife sitting on the hot sand wiping sweat with an angry expression, throwing the wooden scoop down on the ground, Kiem standing nearby looking frustrated and sweaty, hot bright lighting, tension and annoyance atmosphere, medium shot, professional artwork.
subject: Kiem's Wife

original_text: Dân làng kéo ra xem và cười nhạo sự lười biếng, tham lam của vợ chồng Kiếm. Họ bảo nhau: 'Vợ chồng nhà ấy dở hơi mới đi xe cát lấp biển'.
translated_text: Villagers gathered to watch and mock their laziness. They laughed, saying the couple was foolish to try such a feat without diligence.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a group of villagers in brown clothes standing in the background pointing fingers and laughing, Kiem and his wife arguing loudly in the foreground, beach setting, harsh daylight, mocking and chaotic atmosphere, wide angle shot, highly detailed.
subject: Villagers

original_text: Họ hàng cá định mang vàng lên biếu, nhưng thấy hai vợ chồng cãi nhau và lười biếng, chúng liền vứt vàng xuống biển và bỏ đi.
translated_text: The fish intended to offer gold, but seeing the couple arguing and lazy, they threw the gold back into the depths and swam away.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, fish popping their heads out of the water surface observing the arguing couple on shore, then diving back down with a splash leaving ripples, blue ocean water, disappointment and rejection mood, split water-level shot, masterpiece quality.
subject: Fish

original_text: Mọi người bỏ về hết, chỉ còn vợ chồng Kiếm ở lại cãi nhau. Cuối cùng họ kiệt sức và chết trên bãi cát.
translated_text: Everyone left, leaving Kiem and his wife alone. They continued to argue until they collapsed and died from exhaustion on the sand.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, two motionless figures lying apart on the empty desolate beach as the sun sets, long dark purple shadows stretching across the sand, waves lapping nearby, melancholic and tragic atmosphere, cinematic sunset lighting, wide landscape shot, highly detailed.
subject: Kiem and Wife

original_text: Hai vợ chồng hóa thành loài còng biển (dã tràng), suốt ngày xe cát tìm đường xuống biển nhưng sóng lại đánh tan, công cốc.
translated_text: They transformed into sand crabs. Forever they dig sand balls to clear a path, but the waves always wash their efforts away.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, two small sand crabs (ghost crabs) crawling on the wet sand rolling small sand pellets, a large ocean wave crashing onto the shore washing away their work, soft twilight lighting, symbolic and karmic atmosphere, close-up macro shot, masterpiece quality.
subject: Sand Crabs

original_text: Ngày xưa, có hai vợ chồng nhà nghèo, sinh nhai bằng nghề cuốc mướn. Năm nọ mất mùa, họ phải mò cua bắt ốc ăn qua ngày.
translated_text: Once upon a time, a poor couple lived by farming. During a severe famine, they had to forage for crabs and snails to survive.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a gaunt peasant couple wading knee-deep in a muddy rice field, wearing tattered brown clothes and damaged conical hats, collecting snails into a worn woven bamboo basket, grey overcast sky signaling famine, desolate rural landscape with dry cracked earth in background, flat diffuse lighting, somber and gritty atmosphere, wide angle shot, masterpiece quality.
subject: Couple

original_text: Nạn đói lan rộng, người chồng quyết định đi nơi khác kiếm ăn. Anh dặn vợ: 'Mình ở nhà chờ tôi ba năm. Nếu quá hạn thì hãy đi lấy chồng khác'.
translated_text: As the famine spread, the husband decided to leave. He told his wife: 'Wait for me for three years. If I do not return by then, you may remarry.'
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the husband tying a small cloth bundle while talking seriously to his wife, the wife standing nearby with tears welling in her eyes, inside a dilapidated thatched hut with mud walls, soft sad afternoon light filtering through holes in the roof, sorrowful and separation atmosphere, medium shot, professional artwork.
subject: Husband

original_text: Người vợ khóc lóc thảm thiết nhưng đành để chồng ra đi. Tiễn chồng xong, nàng xin được việc làm ở nhà một người chủ tốt bụng.
translated_text: The wife wept bitterly but let him go. After seeing him off, she found work at the house of a kind master.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the wife standing at the bamboo village gate looking at her husband's small figure fading into the misty distance, an old banyan tree with hanging roots in the background, morning mist and soft pale light, emotional farewell atmosphere, wide landscape shot, highly detailed, 8k resolution.
subject: Wife

original_text: Thời gian trôi qua, cây bưởi trước sân đã ba lần trổ hoa mà chồng nàng vẫn biệt vô âm tín. Người chủ nhà góa vợ ngỏ ý muốn cưới nàng.
translated_text: Time passed. The pomelo tree bloomed three times, but there was no news of her husband. The widowed master proposed to her.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the wife leaning against a wooden pillar looking at a pomelo tree full of white fragrant flowers, the master standing respectfully in the background watching her, soft sunset lighting casting long nostalgic shadows, melancholic and longing mood, medium shot, highly detailed.
subject: Wife

original_text: Nàng xin hoãn lại: 'Chồng tôi hẹn ba năm. Nay đã hết hạn, chắc anh ấy đã mất. Xin cho tôi để tang chồng thêm ba năm nữa cho trọn đạo'.
translated_text: She asked for a delay: 'My husband promised three years. He must be dead. Please let me mourn him for another three years to fulfill my duty.'
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the wife wearing a white mourning headband sitting at a dark wooden table, speaking gently but firmly to the master, a simple ceramic tea set on the table, dim candlelight creating a solemn chiaroscuro effect, respectful and traditional atmosphere, close-up portrait, professional artwork.
subject: Wife

original_text: Ba năm nữa lại trôi qua. Chiều chiều nàng ra ngõ ngóng trông nhưng vẫn không thấy bóng dáng chồng cũ.
translated_text: Three more years passed. Every evening, she waited at the gate, but her old husband never appeared.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the wife standing alone at the wooden village gate looking down an empty dusty road, orange and purple sunset sky with flying birds returning to nests, desolate rural scenery, hopeless and lonely atmosphere, wide landscape shot, masterpiece quality.
subject: Wife

original_text: Người chủ lại khuyên nhủ. Vừa tuyệt vọng tin chồng, vừa cảm động tấm lòng người chủ, nàng đồng ý tái giá.
translated_text: The master persuaded her again. Having lost hope and touched by his kindness, she agreed to marry him.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a simple wedding ceremony inside a traditional wooden house, the wife and the master bowing before the ancestor altar with incense smoke curling up, red candles burning brightly, warm yellow festive lighting, acceptance and new beginning atmosphere, medium shot, highly detailed.
subject: Wife and Master

original_text: Đột nhiên, ba tháng sau, người chồng cũ trở về trong bộ dạng nghèo khổ. Anh đau đớn tột cùng khi biết vợ đã lấy chồng mới.
translated_text: Suddenly, three months later, the old husband returned, still in rags. He was devastated to learn his wife had remarried.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the old husband with a messy beard and ragged brown clothes standing at the gate holding a walking stick, looking at the happy couple inside the house with a shocked and heartbroken expression, harsh contrast lighting, shock and despair atmosphere, medium shot, 8k quality.
subject: Old Husband

original_text: Tuyệt vọng, người chồng cũ treo cổ tự vẫn trên cây đa đầu làng.
translated_text: In despair, the old husband hanged himself on the banyan tree at the village entrance.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, artistic silhouette shot, a pair of worn-out sandals left neatly at the base of a giant ancient banyan tree, a dark shadow of a man hanging from a branch visible only as a silhouette against a large pale full moon, eerie and tragic atmosphere, low angle shot, cinematic composition.
subject: Old Husband (Silhouette)

original_text: Người vợ thấy vậy, hối hận và đau xót, liền nhảy xuống ao đâm đầu tự tử theo.
translated_text: Seeing this, the wife, filled with regret and grief, jumped into the pond to drown herself.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the wife standing at the edge of a dark lotus pond, ripples spreading on the black water surface reflecting the moonlight, her sandals left on the wooden dock, night lighting with cold blue tones, tragic and heartbroken mood, medium shot, highly detailed.
subject: Wife

original_text: Người chồng mới thương vợ, sau khi làm ma cho nàng cũng uống thuốc độc quyên sinh.
translated_text: The new husband, grieving for his wife, took poison to follow her after her funeral.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the master sitting alone at a table holding a small ceramic cup of poison with trembling hands, tears streaming down his face, a dim oil lamp dying out in the background, sorrowful and loyal atmosphere, close-up portrait, professional artwork.
subject: New Husband

original_text: Xuống âm phủ, cả ba người được Diêm Vương xét xử. Họ khai báo sự tình và tình cảm sâu nặng dành cho nhau.
translated_text: In the Underworld, King Yan judged them. They explained their tragic story and their deep love for one another.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, King Yan (Diem Vuong) with a fierce red face and black beard sitting on a high dark throne, three transparent glowing souls kneeling respectfully before him, mystical green and red fog lighting, supernatural and judicial atmosphere, wide angle shot, masterpiece quality.
subject: King Yan

original_text: Cảm động trước tình nghĩa của ba người, Diêm Vương cho họ hóa thành ba ông đầu rau (Táo quân) để không bao giờ phải xa nhau.
translated_text: Touched by their loyalty, King Yan transformed them into the three kitchen hearthstones (Tao Quan), so they would never be parted.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a magical transformation scene, the three souls morphing into three clay hearthstones arranged in a triangle, swirling golden magical dust and light surrounding them, mythical and destined atmosphere, medium shot, 8k resolution.
subject: Souls

original_text: Từ đó, ba người ở bên nhau trông coi bếp lửa cho mọi nhà, được gọi là Táo Quân.
translated_text: Since then, they remain together watching over the kitchen fires of every home, known as the Kitchen Gods.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, three clay hearthstones (Ong Dau Rau) arranged in a triangle shape in a cooking fire, warm orange flames licking around them, a black cast iron pot sitting securely on top, cozy traditional kitchen setting with firewood, symbolic and eternal atmosphere, close-up object shot, highly detailed.
subject: Hearthstones

original_text: Thuở xưa, có hai người bạn chơi rất thân là Đại Phú và Chí Quân. Đại Phú thì giàu nứt đố đổ vách, còn Chí Quân thì nghèo rớt mồng tơi.
translated_text: Once upon a time, two close friends named Dai Phu and Chi Quan lived in a village. Dai Phu was extremely wealthy, while Chi Quan was very poor.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, two men standing side by side under the shade of an ancient banyan tree with hanging roots, Dai Phu wearing luxurious blue silk robes and holding a fan, Chi Quan wearing patched brown peasant clothes and bare feet, dappled sunlight filtering through leaves, friendly and rustic village atmosphere, full body shot, highly detailed.
subject: Dai Phu and Chi Quan

original_text: Đại Phú muốn giúp vốn làm ăn, nhưng Chí Quân từ chối vì sợ kinh doanh thất bát sẽ không có tiền trả bạn.
translated_text: Dai Phu offered capital to help his friend, but Chi Quan refused, fearing he could not repay the debt if the business failed.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, inside a simple bamboo hut, Dai Phu holding a heavy silk bag of gold coins offering it forward, Chi Quan waving his hands in polite refusal with a humble expression, soft natural light entering through bamboo window bars, sincere and respectful atmosphere, medium shot, professional artwork.
subject: Chi Quan

original_text: Đại Phú thuê thợ làm một con rùa bằng vàng ròng để chơi. Một hôm, Chí Quân đến thăm, Đại Phú đem rùa vàng ra khoe rồi cả hai uống rượu say mềm.
translated_text: Dai Phu commissioned a solid gold turtle. One day, Chi Quan visited, and Dai Phu showed off the treasure before they both got drunk.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a gleaming solid gold turtle statue sitting on a porcelain plate on a wooden table, Dai Phu pointing at it proudly, Chi Quan looking with admiration, ceramic wine jars scattered on the table, warm interior candlelight creating sparkling reflections on the gold, convivial atmosphere, close-up shot, masterpiece quality.
subject: Dai Phu

original_text: Con trai Đại Phú đi học xa về, thấy rùa vàng đẹp liền lấy đem đi chơi. Lúc Chí Quân ra về, Đại Phú tìm không thấy rùa đâu, trong lòng bối rối nghi ngờ bạn.
translated_text: Dai Phu's son returned from school and secretly took the gold turtle to play. When Chi Quan left, Dai Phu couldn't find it and suspiciously doubted his friend.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, split depth composition, in the background a young boy in fine clothes sneaking the gold turtle off the table, in the foreground Dai Phu searching under the table with a worried and suspicious frown, dim afternoon light, suspenseful and confused atmosphere, medium shot, highly detailed.
subject: Dai Phu's Son

original_text: Hôm sau, Đại Phú đến hỏi khéo. Chí Quân sợ bạn buồn và nghi ngờ lòng mình, nên đành nhận liều là đã cầm con rùa về.
translated_text: The next day, Dai Phu asked indirectly. Chi Quan, fearing the loss of trust and friendship, falsely admitted to borrowing the turtle.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Dai Phu and Chi Quan sitting at a square tea table, Dai Phu looking inquiringly with raised eyebrows, Chi Quan looking down with a conflicted and sweating face, tense psychological atmosphere, natural window lighting casting side shadows, medium shot, professional artwork.
subject: Chi Quan

original_text: Đại Phú nghe vậy thì yên tâm, hào phóng tặng luôn con rùa cho bạn. Chí Quân về nhà lo lắng không biết lấy gì để trả.
translated_text: Relieved, Dai Phu generously gifted the turtle to his friend. Chi Quan returned home, terrified because he had nothing to return.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Dai Phu smiling broadly and patting Chi Quan's shoulder in a gesture of brotherhood, Chi Quan walking away down a dirt path with a heavy hunched posture and worried face, village scenery with sunset lighting, contrasting emotions, wide angle shot, highly detailed.
subject: Chi Quan

original_text: Vợ chồng Chí Quân quyết định bán nhà và xin làm người ở cho ông Phú (một người giàu khác) để lấy tiền đúc con rùa vàng khác trả lại Đại Phú.
translated_text: Chi Quan and his wife sold their house and offered to serve a wealthy man named Ong Phu to get money to cast a new gold turtle.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Chi Quan and his wife kneeling respectfully on a woven mat before a benevolent old man (Ong Phu) with a white beard, handing over a paper land deed, simple wooden house interior, dramatic side lighting, desperate and loyal atmosphere, medium shot, 8k resolution.
subject: Chi Quan and Wife

original_text: Cảm động trước tình bạn, ông Phú cho đúc rùa vàng đưa cho Chí Quân đem trả, và cho họ ở nhờ chứ không bắt làm người hầu.
translated_text: Moved by their integrity, Ong Phu made a new gold turtle for Chi Quan to return, allowing them to stay without servitude.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Ong Phu handing a shiny new gold turtle to Chi Quan with both hands, Chi Quan bowing deeply in gratitude, warm golden light illuminating the scene signifying kindness, benevolent and touching atmosphere, medium shot, professional artwork.
subject: Ong Phu

original_text: Chí Quân đem rùa vàng đến trả Đại Phú. Ít lâu sau, con trai Đại Phú mang con rùa vàng thật về trả lại cho cha.
translated_text: Chi Quan returned the turtle to Dai Phu. Shortly after, Dai Phu's son returned home and gave back the original gold turtle.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Dai Phu standing in shock holding two identical gold turtles, one in each hand, his son standing nearby looking innocent, luxurious living room background with vases and furniture, bright revealing light, realization and surprise atmosphere, medium shot, masterpiece quality.
subject: Dai Phu

original_text: Hiểu ra sự tình, Đại Phú vội mang rùa vàng đến nhà ông Phú để trả lại và xin đón vợ chồng bạn về, nhưng nhà đã bán mất rồi.
translated_text: Realizing the truth, Dai Phu rushed to Ong Phu's house to return the second turtle and redeem his friend, but the house was already sold.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, Dai Phu running anxiously towards a large wooden gate, holding a gold turtle wrapped in red cloth, sweat on his forehead, dynamic motion blur on clothes, afternoon sunlight, urgent and apologetic atmosphere, wide angle shot, highly detailed.
subject: Dai Phu

original_text: Tại nhà ông Phú, ba người tranh luận. Ông Phú không nhận rùa, Đại Phú muốn trả rùa, còn Chí Quân không chịu về vì đã mang ơn.
translated_text: At Ong Phu's house, the three men argued. Ong Phu refused the turtle, Dai Phu insisted on returning it, and Chi Quan refused to leave his debt.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, three men (Dai Phu, Chi Quan, Ong Phu) standing in a triangle formation arguing passionately in a courtyard, Dai Phu holding the turtle out, Ong Phu pushing it back, Chi Quan bowing, dramatic lighting, chaotic but honorable atmosphere, medium shot, professional artwork.
subject: Three men

original_text: Cuối cùng, cả ba đưa nhau lên quan nhờ phân xử. Quan trên cũng bối rối trước ba người quá đỗi thật thà và tốt bụng này.
translated_text: Finally, they went to the mandarin for judgment. The official was baffled by such rare honesty and kindness from all three.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a Mandarin official in blue court robes sitting at a high wooden desk scratching his head in confusion, the three men kneeling respectfully below in the court yard, ancient architecture with pillars, solemn but humorous atmosphere, wide angle shot, highly detailed.
subject: Mandarin Official

original_text: Ngày xưa, có chàng trai đẹp mã nhưng bị mù (thong manh) từ nhỏ. Anh ta rất khéo léo che giấu tật của mình nên không ai biết.
translated_text: Once upon a time, there was a handsome young man who was blind from childhood. He was very clever at hiding his disability, so no one knew.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a handsome young man with clear but unseeing eyes walking confidently down a village lane, wearing a traditional brown silk tunic and neat headscarf, villagers passing by without noticing his condition, soft diffuse sunlight filtering through bamboo hedges, secretive and serene atmosphere, close-up portrait, highly detailed, masterpiece quality.
subject: Young Man

original_text: Tại một đám tiệc, anh ta giả vờ đo nhà và gõ cán cào để ra vẻ sành sỏi. Chủ nhà tưởng anh là người nết na, chăm chỉ nên gả con gái cho.
translated_text: At a gathering, he feigned measuring the house and fixing a rake to appear capable. Impressed, the host offered him his daughter's hand in marriage.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the young man crouching on a sun-baked brick courtyard holding a wooden mallet striking a rake handle with focus, an older bearded man watching approvingly in the background, warm afternoon golden light casting long shadows, rustic farming tools scattered around, industrious and humorous atmosphere, medium shot, professional artwork.
subject: Young Man

original_text: Sau đám cưới, anh đi cày ruộng. Vì không thấy đường, anh cày lấn sang ruộng hàng xóm và lật cả bờ, nhưng lại nói dối mẹ vợ là đang đắp bờ.
translated_text: After the wedding, he went to plow. Blind, he plowed into the neighbor's field and ruined the border, but lied to his mother-in-law that he was reinforcing it.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a man struggling to guide a water buffalo in a muddy rice paddy, the furrow lines are crooked and cutting deep into the green grassy bank destroying it, an older woman standing on the edge pointing in shock, bright harsh noon sunlight, chaotic and energetic atmosphere, wide angle shot, 8k resolution.
subject: Young Man

original_text: Lúc ra giếng, anh bị ngã xuống nước. Khi vợ hỏi, anh nhanh trí bảo là xuống cọ rửa giếng cho sạch.
translated_text: At the well, he fell in. When his wife asked, he quickly claimed he was down there cleaning the moss off the walls.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, view from inside a deep circular brick well looking up, a man clinging desperately to mossy wet walls with water up to his waist, the wife's face silhouetted against the bright circular sky opening above, cool damp blue lighting inside contrasting with warm light above, claustrophobic and dramatic atmosphere, low angle shot.
